versioning_policy.major: breaking schema, setting lifecycle, approval, activation, provider, public verification, permission or API change
versioning_policy.minor: new backward-compatible setting group, setting definition, feature flag, environment rule or workflow extension
versioning_policy.patch: bug fix, validation update, copy/config correction
versioning_policy.setting_versioning: Every active setting is immutable and superseded by new versions, never overwritten.
versioning_policy.definition_versioning: Every definition has definition_version and schema history.

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
